title: Initial Pod Cleanups
body: Convert pods to use file locking and add pod labels in preparation for adding pod backend to the DB.

comments.body: Changes LGTM, tests aren't too happy though @mheon
Tests green again, should be good for review/merge

@mheon could you squash your PRS into two, one for the locks and one from the Update pods to  use file locks.
Then we can merge.
@rhatdan ack, will move the lock changes out into a separate PR
Moved the more general locking changes out to #138
